expectations.text: The contact form has name, email, and message fields
expectations.evidence: ContactForm in forms.py has: name (StringField), email (StringField), message (TextAreaField)

expectations.text: Flask-WTF is used for form handling
expectations.evidence: Flask-WTF imported and used: from flask_wtf import FlaskForm, CSRFProtect(app) in __init__.py

expectations.text: Form validation works (required fields, email format)
expectations.evidence: Validators applied: DataRequired(), Email() for email field, Length() for message

expectations.text: A success message/page appears after submission
expectations.evidence: success.html template created, route redirects to success page after form.validate_on_submit()
CSRF token found in HTML: <input id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" type="hidden" value="...">

expectations.text: The app is running in a sandbox
